meaning: 1. to say candidly; 2. to acknowledge frankly
sentence: 他坦言自己当时确实很紧张。
pinyin: Tā tǎnyán zìjǐ dāngshí quèshí hěn jǐnzhāng.
english: He frankly acknowledged that he was indeed very nervous at the time.

sentence: 这个地区淡水资源十分稀缺。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū dànshuǐ zīyuán shífēn xīquē.
english: Fresh water resources are extremely scarce in this region.

sentence: 孩子们看马戏表演看得很开心。
pinyin: Háizimen kàn mǎxì biǎoyǎn kàn de hěn kāixīn.
english: The children had a great time watching the circus performance.

sentence: 这位学者一生著述颇丰。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xuézhě yīshēng zhùshù pō fēng.
english: This scholar produced a prolific body of writing throughout his life.

sentence: 他在教堂受洗，正式成为基督徒。
pinyin: Tā zài jiàotáng shòuxǐ, zhèngshì chéngwéi Jīdūtú.
english: He received baptism at the church and formally became a Christian.

sentence: 这棵大树的根系延伸很广。
pinyin: Zhè kē dà shù de gēnxì yánshēn hěn guǎng.
english: This large tree's root system spreads very wide.

sentence: 麦克风把声音转换成电信号。
pinyin: Màikèfēng bǎ shēngyīn zhuǎnhuàn chéng diànxìnhào.
english: A microphone converts sound into electrical signals.

sentence: 他每天都研究个股的走势。
pinyin: Tā měitiān dōu yánjiū gègǔ de zǒushì.
english: He studies the trends of individual shares every day.

sentence: 莎士比亚是历史上最著名的戏剧家之一。
pinyin: Shāshìbǐyà shì lìshǐ shang zuì zhùmíng de xìjùjiā zhīyī.
english: Shakespeare is one of the most famous playwrights in history.

sentence: 这项服务是有偿的，需要付费。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng fúwù shì yǒucháng de, xūyào fùfèi.
english: This service is paid — you need to pay a fee.

sentence: 他在读一本关于西方哲学史的书。
pinyin: Tā zài dú yī běn guānyú xīfāng zhéxuéshǐ de shū.
english: He is reading a book on the history of Western philosophy.

sentence: 这次军演持续了三天。
pinyin: Zhè cì jūnyǎn chíxùle sān tiān.
english: This military exercise lasted three days.

sentence: 秘书把报告呈送给总经理。
pinyin: Mìshū bǎ bàogào chéngsòng gěi zǒng jīnglǐ.
english: The secretary presented the report to the general manager.

sentence: 良好的管治对城市发展很重要。
pinyin: Liánghǎo de guǎnzhì duì chéngshì fāzhǎn hěn zhòngyào.
english: Good governance is very important for urban development.

sentence: 宇航员已经登上了空间站。
pinyin: Yǔhángyuán yǐjīng dēng shàngle kōngjiānzhàn.
english: The astronauts have boarded the space station.

sentence: 他周末喜欢看动作片。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò xǐhuān kàn dòngzuòpiàn.
english: He likes to watch action movies on weekends.

sentence: 市场上卖的工艺品很有特色。
pinyin: Shìchǎng shàng mài de gōngyìpǐn hěn yǒu tèsè.
english: The handicrafts sold at the market are very distinctive.

sentence: 游戏服务器今晚十二点会下线维护。
pinyin: Yóuxì fúwùqì jīn wǎn shí'èr diǎn huì xiàxiàn wéihù.
english: The game server will go offline for maintenance at midnight tonight.

sentence: 街上走过来一个高个子洋人。
pinyin: Jiē shàng zǒu guòlái yī gè gāo gèzi yángrén.
english: A tall foreigner walked down the street toward us.

sentence: 孩子们躲进山洞里避雨。
pinyin: Háizimen duǒ jìn shāndòng lǐ bì yǔ.
english: The children hid inside the cave to shelter from the rain.

sentence: 这个假说还没有得到证实。
pinyin: Zhège jiǎshuō hái méiyǒu dédào zhèngshí.
english: This hypothesis has not yet been confirmed.

sentence: 地板上有一滩血迹。
pinyin: Dìbǎn shàng yǒu yī tān xuèjì.
english: There is a bloodstain on the floor.

sentence: 这位歌手有很多忠实的追随者。
pinyin: Zhè wèi gēshǒu yǒu hěn duō zhōngshí de zhuīsuízhě.
english: This singer has many loyal followers.

sentence: 页面加载太慢了，换个网络试试。
pinyin: Yèmiàn jiāzǎi tài màn le, huàn gè wǎngluò shìshi.
english: The page is loading too slowly — try switching networks.

sentence: 学姐帮我看了一遍简历。
pinyin: Xuéjiě bāng wǒ kànle yī biàn jiǎnlì.
english: My senior schoolmate helped me look over my résumé.

meaning: 1. top floor; 2. the top of a building
sentence: 他住在这栋楼的顶层。
pinyin: Tā zhù zài zhè dòng lóu de dǐngcéng.
english: He lives on the top floor of this building.

sentence: 秋天的树叶变成了金黄色。
pinyin: Qiūtiān de shùyè biànchéngle jīnhuáng sè.
english: The autumn leaves have turned golden yellow.

sentence: 操作前请先阅读安全规程。
pinyin: Cāozuò qián qǐng xiān yuèdú ānquán guīchéng.
english: Please read the safety regulations before operating the equipment.

sentence: 他把袖子卷起来洗碗。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xiùzi juǎn qǐlái xǐ wǎn.
english: He rolled up his sleeves to wash the dishes.

sentence: 他赤裸着上身在院子里干活。
pinyin: Tā chìluǒ zhe shàngshēn zài yuànzi lǐ gànhuó.
english: He worked bare-chested in the yard.

meaning: 1. to obtain by an effort; 2. to strive to get sth
sentence: 她终于为团队争得了参赛资格。
pinyin: Tā zhōngyú wèi tuánduì zhēng déle cānsài zīgé.
english: She finally won a competition spot for the team.

sentence: 他今天领到了本月的工资。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān lǐng dàole běn yuè de gōngzī.
english: He received this month's salary today.

sentence: 王妃出现在公众面前时十分优雅。
pinyin: Wángfēi chūxiàn zài gōngzhòng miànqián shí shífēn yōuyǎ.
english: The princess was very elegant when she appeared in public.

sentence: 她是一名普通的初中生。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng pǔtōng de chūzhōngshēng.
english: She is an ordinary junior high school student.

sentence: 长时间不用会弱化肌肉力量。
pinyin: Cháng shíjiān bù yòng huì ruòhuà jīròu lìliàng.
english: Not using your muscles for a long time will weaken them.

meaning: 1. to return to old ways (a Confucian aspiration); 2. to turn back the
sentence: 她今天穿了一套复古风格的裙子。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān chuānle yī tào fùgǔ fēnggé de qúnzi.
english: She wore a retro-style dress today.

sentence: 他从小就喜欢听摇滚乐。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù xǐhuān tīng yáogǔnyuè.
english: He has loved listening to rock music since childhood.

sentence: 下一集会接续上周的剧情。
pinyin: Xià yī jí huì jiēxù shàng zhōu de jùqíng.
english: The next episode will continue the storyline from last week.

sentence: 她是这家公司的创办人之一。
pinyin: Tā shì zhè jiā gōngsī de chuàngbànrén zhī yī.
english: She is one of the founders of this company.

meaning: 1. to carry a passenger; 2. (of spaceships etc) manned; 3. also pr. [z
sentence: 这艘载人飞船即将升空。
pinyin: Zhè sōu zàirén fēichuán jíjiāng shēngkōng.
english: This manned spacecraft is about to lift off.

sentence: 太空船成功返回地球大气层。
pinyin: Tàikōngchuán chénggōng fǎnhuí dìqiú dàqìcéng.
english: The spaceship successfully re-entered Earth's atmosphere.

sentence: 他说的普通话非常纯正。
pinyin: Tā shuō de Pǔtōnghuà fēicháng chúnzhèng.
english: His Mandarin is very pure and standard.

sentence: 两国已签署了这份议定书。
pinyin: Liǎng guó yǐ qiānshǔle zhè fèn yìdìngshū.
english: The two countries have signed this protocol.

meaning: 1. to get on a horse; 2. to mount
sentence: 教练扶着他上马。
pinyin: Jiàoliàn fúzhe tā shàng mǎ.
english: The coach helped him get on the horse.

sentence: 他们举行了传统的宗教仪式。
pinyin: Tāmen jǔxíngle chuántǒng de zōngjiào yíshì.
english: They held a traditional religious ceremony.

meaning: 1. a person who has passed the county level imperial exam (historical)
sentence: 古代考中秀才是很光荣的事。
pinyin: Gǔdài kǎo zhōng xiùcai shì hěn guāngróng de shì.
english: In ancient times, passing the exam to become a scholar was a great honor.

sentence: 他总爱吹嘘自己的成就。
pinyin: Tā zǒng ài chuīxū zìjǐ de chéngjiù.
english: He always loves to brag about his achievements.

sentence: 岛屿的南端有一座灯塔。
pinyin: Dǎoyǔ de nánduān yǒu yī zuò dēngtǎ.
english: There is a lighthouse at the southern tip of the island.

meaning: 1. first day of lunar month; 2. New Year's Day; 3. first year in
sentence: 初一早上全家一起吃汤圆。
pinyin: Chūyī zǎoshang quánjiā yīqǐ chī tāngyuán.
english: On the first day of the lunar new year, the whole family eats tangyuan together.

sentence: 亚马逊雨林里有很多珍稀动物。
pinyin: Yàmǎxùn yǔlín lǐ yǒu hěn duō zhēnxī dòngwù.
english: The Amazon rainforest is home to many rare animals.
